title: pelargonium × gangrenosum
intro: Pelargonium × gangrenosum, also known as the Cancer Bush, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the geranium family. Traditionally, this plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium × gangrenosum include its ability to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support immune function and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
